sp_widget.description: 2.7 Added Angular Provider htmlToStringService; Client controller, deleted _convertHtmlToSimpleString() which was added on 2021-06-25; Added HTML and CSS for State Draft; Added Draft task publish message;
sp_widget.name: Tasker Graph - Task Tree
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"hint":"Set to true to hide the accordion buttons and always show the tree","name":"hide_accordion","section":"other","default_value":"false","label":"Hide Accordion","type":"boolean"}]
sp_widget.template:
Task Tree View

Projected on time:   Warning:   Critical:   Task State Legend: Draft Waiting Unassigned Assigned Accepted Rejected Work in Progress In Review Rework Completed
Note: Hold CTRL and scroll the mouse wheel to zoom in and out.
{{data.draftTaskPublishMessage}}
